case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO VS. LEE A EVANS

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO HUMAN SERVICES AGENCY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-31-2012 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAR-19-2013 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. "DEFENDANT AGREES TO PAY $50/MO BY 10TH OF EACH MONTH BEGINNING WITH NOV 10, 2012. DEFENDANT WILL PAY MONTHLY UNTIL FULL AMOUNT OF $1,224.89 IS PAID. PROGRESS REPORT ON MARCH 19, 2013 AT 1:30PM. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT IF TIMELY PAYMENTS ARE BEING MADE", PER JUDGE QUEENA HO. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY TONY S. MIGUEL, JR.--SENIOR COLLECTION OFFICER. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUENNA HO. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
